assessment.note: She names uncertainty about next-quarter ownership and unease, which is a strong clarity gap and mild growth drag; mentoring remains stalled behind that uncertainty.

new_queue.label: Next-quarter owning
new_queue.name: You said 'not sure what I am owning next quarter' — what's most unclear?
new_queue.description: Drills into the ownership uncertainty she just named so the specific clarity gap is visible.

new_queue.label: Unblocked next step
new_queue.name: What support from me would make your next ownership easier?
new_queue.description: Looks for the specific support she needs to take on the next stretch of work.

new_queue.label: Close-out focus
new_queue.name: Given what we covered, where do you want to focus first over the next two weeks?
new_queue.description: Ends by narrowing to the most useful next move without opening a new thread.
